---
title: "Verification and Reproducibility"
author: "Muhammad Yaseen"
date: last-modified
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Verification and Reproducibility}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: show
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
read_artifact <- function(path) {
  candidates <- c(
    file.path("inst", "verification", path),
    file.path("..", "inst", "verification", path)
  )
  full_path <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)][1]
  if (length(full_path) == 0L || !file.exists(full_path)) {
    return(paste0("Artifact not found: `inst/verification/", path, "`."))
  }
  paste(readLines(full_path, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n")
}
```

## Current Scope

```{r, results='asis'}
cat(read_artifact("chapter-summary-table.md"))
```

## Mismatch Log

```{r, results='asis'}
cat(read_artifact("mismatch-report.md"))
```

## Chapter 11 Taxonomy

```{r, results='asis'}
cat(read_artifact("ch11-mismatch-taxonomy.md"))
```

## Remaining Work

```{r, results='asis'}
cat(read_artifact("remaining-verification-work.md"))
```
